First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

overview.description: The LifeX Durable Income ETF (LFDR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages US Treasury exposure, aiming to provide reliable monthly income and principal distributions over a thirty-year time horizon. LFDR was launched on Dec 16, 2024 and is issued by Stone Ridge.
